query: SELECT pr.PuzzleId, pr.OpeningTags FROM puzzles_raw pr INNER JOIN puzzles p ON pr.PuzzleId = p.id WHERE pr.OpeningTags IS NOT NULL AND pr.OpeningTags != '' AND (p.openingName IS NULL OR p.openingName = '') LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT pr.PuzzleId, pr.OpeningTags FROM puzzles_raw pr INNER JOIN puzzles p ON pr.PuzzleId = p.id WHERE pr.OpeningTags IS NOT NULL AND pr.OpeningTags != '' AND (p.openingName IS NULL OR p.openingName = '') LIMIT 5
